message:
test(update): Add 23 new unit tests for rch/update/* module

- check.rs: Add tests for nightly channel, empty releases, beta-only filtering
- download.rs: Add tests for single checksum, path prefix, multiline format, comprehensive transient error checks
- install.rs: Add tests for directory creation, skipping missing binaries, all binaries backup, install dir creation, content preservation
- verify.rs: Add tests for case-insensitive checksums, empty content, large files, SHA256 verification, binary content
- lock.rs: Add tests for PID file contents, lock removal on drop, stale lock handling, active lock detection, process running edge cases

All 65 update module tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
